title: Antirhea schmutzii
taxonomy: Antirhea schmutzii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is classified as belonging to the genus Antirhea. The genus Antirhea is further grouped under the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants. The classification of Antirhea schmutzii places it within the order Gentianales. The species is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
